name: Neuphoria Therapeutics Inc.
business: Neuphoria Therapeutics Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company dedicated to developing therapies that address the complex needs of individuals affected by neuropsychiatric disorders. Its lead drug candidate, BNC210, is an oral, proprietary, selective negative allosteric modulator of the 7 nicotinic acetylcholine receptor for the acute treatment of social anxiety disorder and chronic treatment of post-traumatic stress disorder. The company also has a strategic partnership with Merck & Co., Inc. for developing positive allosteric modulators of the 7 receptor targeting cognitive dysfunction associated with Alzheimer's disease and other central nervous system conditions.
sellsTo: Patients with Alzheimer's disease and other CNS conditions

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company dedicated to developing therapies that address the complex needs of individuals affected by neuropsychiatric disorders.

catalysts.event: Topline results from Phase 3 AFFIRM-1 trial for BNC210 in SAD
catalysts.sentence: Topline results from the AFFIRM-1 trial are expected early in the fourth quarter of calendar 2025.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 3 AFFIRM-2 trial for BNC210 in SAD
catalysts.sentence: We plan to initiate the AFFIRM-2 trial in SAD in the first half of 2026, contingent upon successful outcomes of AFFIRM-1 and having sufficient capital on hand.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 2b/3 SYMPHONY trial for BNC210 in PTSD
catalysts.sentence: We plan to initiate the Phase 2b/3 SYMPHONY trial in PTSD in the first half of 2026, contingent upon having sufficient capital on hand.

catalysts.event: Milestone payment received from Merck for Phase 2 initiation of MK-1167
catalysts.sentence: On March 19, 2025, the Company received a $15 million milestone payment from Merck.

catalysts.event: Milestone payment received from Carina Biotech for Phase 1 initiation of CNA3103
catalysts.sentence: On October 30, 2024, Carina made a milestone payment to the Company in the gross amount of A$1 million under the terms of the Carina Biotech License agreement.

tamClaims.claim: over 27 million patients in the United States alone suffering from SAD and PTSD
tamClaims.sentence: There remains a significant unmet medical need for the over 27 million patients in the United States alone suffering from SAD and PTSD.

tamClaims.claim: 12-month prevalence of SAD among US adults is 7.1% and lifetime prevalence is 12.1%
tamClaims.sentence: According to the U.S. National Institute of Mental Health, the 12-month prevalence of SAD among adults aged 18 years or older in the United States is 7.1% and it is estimated that 12.1% will experience SAD in their lifetime.

tamClaims.claim: SAD affects approximately 15 million adults in the United States
tamClaims.sentence: Currently, SAD affects approximately 15 million adults in the United States

tamClaims.claim: approximately 9 million people currently suffer from PTSD in the United States
tamClaims.sentence: Approximately 9 million people currently suffer from PTSD in the United States

tamClaims.claim: approximately 8% of the U.S. population will experience PTSD within their lifetimes
tamClaims.sentence: Approximately 8% of the U.S. population will experience PTSD within their lifetimes
